text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With their first clash of the fall G1 season,
Tamamo Cross and Oguri Cap generate as much
buzz as a certain past showdown between Triple
Crown champions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having both risen up from anonymity, these two
budding stars—and the hopes they each
carry—are about to collide.
